subject: Fighting-type energy symbol — a clenched fist inside a circular medallion, set into a fractured stone with radiating cracks
description: A minimalist Pokémon Special Energy card illustration. A round medallion bears the Fighting-type icon — a clenched fist rendered in white silhouette against an orange-red disc. The medallion is embedded in a chunk of dark grey stone, with sharp cracks radiating outward from the disc as if the impact of the fist has fractured the rock. The background is a deep charcoal field crossed by faint motion or impact streaks that imply force and weight. No figures, no landscape, no narrative scene — pure iconography of strength and stone.
foreground: circular fighting-type medallion with clenched-fist symbol embedded in cracked grey stone
background: dark charcoal field with faint diagonal impact streaks
